response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced senior engineer with 15+ years of professional history, making him severely overqualified for an entry-level position. While he holds a relevant CS degree and has Java listed among his skills, his primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js and his Java exposure is limited and dated (Altom, 2016–2018). The most critical disqualifier is German language proficiency listed as 'Basic', whereas the role mandates strong verbal and written German for client-facing insurance digitalization work. His current location in São Paulo also raises relocation feasibility concerns for a Germany-based role requiring travel.
strengths: Holds a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science, satisfying the degree requirement
Demonstrated agile/TDD/CI/CD practices throughout career, aligning with methodology requirements
Cloud experience (AWS CDK) and broad architectural knowledge relevant to the tech stack interests
concerns: German proficiency is 'Basic' — the role mandates strong German for client collaboration in the insurance sector
15+ years as a senior/staff engineer makes him severely overqualified for an entry-level individual contributor role
Primary technical identity is TypeScript/Node.js; Java is a peripheral skill with no recent or deep project evidence
